steps.title: Write the other factor
steps.content:
If $x+3b$ is a factor, write the quadratic as
$$(x+3b)(x+r)=x^2+(r+3b)x+3br$$
The constant term in each choice is $21b$, so
$$3br=21b$$
Because $b$ is positive, divide by $b$ to get $r=7$.

steps.title: Use the middle coefficient
steps.content:
With $r=7$, the middle coefficient must be $7+3b$. Check which listed middle coefficient gives a positive integer $b$.
$$7+3b=37$$
$$3b=30$$
$$b=10$$

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The expression with middle coefficient $37$ is $x^2+37x+21b$. The answer is D.
